translations.english: Sounds useful.

translations.english: Might come in handy.
translations.chinese: 可能派得上用场。

translations.english: An axe imbued with magic fueled by the destruction of the unholy. With every victorious blow against an undead creature, its power grows.
translations.chinese: 一把灌注了魔法的斧头，以毁灭邪恶为动力。力量会随着每次消灭亡灵生物而增长。

translations.english: Arkay warns it's baneful charge abates with each dawn. Something to keep in mind, I suppose.
translations.chinese: 阿尔凯警告，每到黎明，它危险的充能就会减弱。这一点应该需要牢记。

translations.chinese: 阿尔凯和我认为这对我们来说是一个很大的优势，你应该把它们找回来。

translations.english: I've been pouring over some of the tomes left here in the keep. Interesting stories, indeed.
translations.chinese: 我一直在翻看堡垒里剩下的几本大部头书，确实是有趣的故事。

translations.english: Seems the previous incarnation of the Dawnguard had, at one time, some interesting toys.
translations.chinese: 看来从前的黎明守卫曾有过一些有趣的玩具。

translations.english: I assume that the Arch-Curate was corrupted by them when they found a way to breach the Inner Sanctum.
translations.chinese: 我猜他们找到入侵内殿的通道后，腐化了教士长。

translations.english: Yes. They swarmed the Chantry in vast numbers until we were completely overrun. We never really stood a chance.
translations.chinese: 是的，他们大量涌入神殿，直到完全占领了这里。我们一点机会都没有。

translations.english: So, this is snow elf magic. Incredible.
translations.chinese: 看来，这就是雪精灵魔法，太妙了。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02015063]

translations.english: Correct. We only numbered perhaps a hundred at the time, so our presence remained a secret to the dwarves and the Nords.
translations.chinese: 是的，当时只有约一百人，所以我们的存在对矮人和诺德人还是个秘密。

translations.english: Ironically, our undoing came at the hands of our own people.
translations.chinese: 讽刺的是，灭族是由我们自己的人民导致的。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02015064]

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Ironically, our undoing came at the hands of our own people. | ZH: 讽刺的是，灭族是由我们自己的人民导致的。 | SID: 001BB7

translations.english: I've often asked myself that very same question. The blinding of my race was supposedly accomplished with a toxin.
translations.chinese: 我也经常问自己同样的问题，我们种族的失明据说是一种毒素导致的。

translations.english: Certainly not enough to devolve them into the sad and twisted beings they've become.
translations.chinese: 当然还不足以让他们变成现在这样悲伤而扭曲的生物。

translations.english: But when it was all said and done, those elves were either slaughtered, vanished or gave up and took the dwarves' bargain.
translations.chinese: 但当尘埃落定后，那些精灵要么被屠杀，要么消失或放弃，接受了矮人的提议。

translations.english: There were splinter groups that resisted the agreement, and even some that sought alternate alliances.
translations.chinese: 有一些分裂组织抵制该协议，有的甚至去寻求别的同盟。

translations.english: In a manner of speaking.
translations.chinese: 某种意义上吧。

translations.english: We had always maintained an uneasy alliance with the underground-dwelling dwarves, and when faced with extinction we turned to them for help.
translations.chinese: 我们一直和地下的矮人保持着不太稳定的联盟，当灭族之祸来临，我们向他们求助。

translations.english: Surprisingly, they agreed to protect us but demanded a terrible price... the blinding of our race.
translations.chinese: 出乎意料的是，他们同意提供保护，但开了一个可怕的条件……全族失明。

translations.english: Precisely! The people will put pressure on the Dawnguard who are apparently murdering their fellows without provocation.
translations.chinese: 正是如此！人们会对无缘无故谋杀自己同胞的黎明守卫施加压力。

translations.english: Their focus will be shifted from us, giving us one less nuisance to deal with.
translations.chinese: 他们的注意力会从我们身上移开，这样就少了一个麻烦。

translations.english: You know, an important member of society. Someone attached to the Jarl's court, a merchant, a bard, a priest, someone with stature.
translations.chinese: 就是，社会上的重要成员。依附于领主宫廷的人、商人、吟游诗人、祭司，诸如此类有地位的人。

translations.english: That will make them all more upset to have one of their citizens slain, and under such flimsy pretense.
translations.chinese: 这会让他们更加不安,因为公民竟因如此脆弱的借口被杀害。

translations.english: Don't make a big scene. Don't get caught.
translations.chinese: 别搞出个大场面，别被抓住。

translations.english: The corpse is to be the message, not the attack.
translations.chinese: 尸体是用来传达信息的，不是用来袭击。

translations.english: What do you think I mean?
translations.chinese: 你觉得我是什么意思？

translations.english: What do you mean by "don't draw attention?"
translations.chinese: 你说的“别引人注意”是什么意思？

translations.english: Apparently you had blood in your ears when I said not to draw attention to yourself. If I wanted a messy kill I would have said so.
translations.chinese: 显然在我跟你说别给自己引起注意的时候，你耳朵里塞血了。我要是想要一场混乱的杀戮肯定是会那么说的。

translations.english: But a kill is a kill, and it'll send a message to the Dawnguard, if not exactly the one we wanted.
translations.chinese: 但杀了就杀了，并且也会给黎明守卫发送信息，就算不是我们想要的那个。

translations.english: If remnants of our kind who escaped the betrayal at the hands of the dwarves exist out there, perhaps they will find this place one day.
translations.chinese: 如果有残存同族能够逃离矮人掌控的背叛者，或许某天他们会找到这个地方。

translations.english: For the time being, they will remain open.
translations.chinese: 目前的话，它们仍旧是开放的。

translations.english: Oh yes. They were an important part of the process here.
translations.chinese: 啊对。它们是这个过程中的重要组成部分。

translations.english: They represented the steps the Initiates took on the path to total enlightenment.
translations.chinese: 它们象征新人通往完全启蒙之路上的步伐。

translations.english: Sadly, the magic used to construct these wonders were lost long before I arrived here.
translations.chinese: 可惜，建造这些奇迹的魔法在我来这里之前就失传了。

translations.english: But those temples paled in comparison to the glory of the Chantry and its wayshrines.
translations.chinese: 但这些神殿与奥瑞艾尔神殿的光辉相比黯然失色。

translations.english: Our empire had temples to some of the other deities: Trinimac, Syrabane, Jephre and Phynaster rounded out the rest.
translations.chinese: 我们的帝国还有一些其他神灵的神殿：崔尼玛克，希拉班，杰符瑞和菲纳斯特。

translations.english: Auriel is one of the elven gods. He's with the rest of them in Aetherius.
translations.chinese: 奥瑞艾尔是精灵诸神之一，他们都在光界。

translations.english: Supposedly, the bow draws its energy from the sun itself, which it why it shows up in that prophecy.
translations.chinese: 据说弓的能量来自太阳本身，这就是为什么它会出现在那个预言里。

translations.english: The way I've heard it, the sun represents the connection from our world to theirs.
translations.chinese: 据我所知，太阳代表着我们世界与他们世界之间的联系。

translations.english: Not much. If you read any history, it shows up from time to time, but it's a hard thing to track.
translations.chinese: 也不多。如果你读历史就会发现它时不时出场，但难以追踪。

translations.english: As far as I know, though, it's never been held by a vampire. That would be a new one.
translations.chinese: 据我所知，它从没有被吸血鬼持有过。看来要破记录了。

translations.english: Honestly, I don't think they care what a bunch of vampires would do with Auriel's Bow. They're pretty focused on the past.
translations.chinese: 说实话，我觉得他们根本不在乎一群吸血鬼拿奥瑞艾尔之弓要做什么，他们只专注于过去。

translations.english: As long as we can get this "Vyrthur" out of the Sanctum, I think they'll be happy to just hand it over.
translations.chinese: 只要我们能把这个“维苏尔”赶出圣堂，估计他们会很乐意把弓交给我们。

translations.english: How dare you set foot in here, after being infected by those foul beasts?
translations.chinese: 你还敢进这里来？在被那些肮脏野兽感染后？

translations.english: I'll give you a chance to redeem yourself. Go to Morthal and speak to Falion. He can help you. Otherwise you're dead to me.
translations.chinese: 再给你个自我救赎的机会，去莫萨尔找法利昂。他能帮你，不然你死定了。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02015CF3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I ought to cut you to pieces right where you stand... | ZH: 我是该现在就把你劈个粉碎的…… | SID: 001308
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: How dare you set foot in here, after being infected by those foul beasts? | ZH: 你还敢进这里来？在被那些肮脏野兽感染后？ | SID: 00192D
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I'll give you a chance to redeem yourself. Go to Morthal and speak to Falion. He can help you. Otherwise you're dead to me. | ZH: 再给你个自我救赎的机会，去莫萨尔找法利昂。他能帮你，不然你死定了。 | SID: 001C4A

translations.english: Get out of here, monster.
translations.chinese: 滚出去，怪物。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02015CF4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Get out of here, monster. | ZH: 滚出去，怪物。 | SID: 001747

translations.english: Get yourself cured immediately. You're a threat to all of us otherwise.
translations.chinese: 立刻去治好自己，否则你对我们所有人都是一个威胁。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02015CF5]
Translations:

translations.english: You're not welcome here as long as you're one of those... monsters.
translations.chinese: 这里不欢迎你了，因为你是那群……野兽的一员。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02015CF6]

translations.english: You need to get cured, friend. You're a danger to the Dawnguard otherwise.
translations.chinese: 你得把自己治好，朋友。否则你会对黎明守卫构成威胁。

translations.english: It may seem cruel that we hold our thin-blooded kin in low esteem. But our needs must come before theirs.
translations.chinese: 对瘦弱的血亲不屑一顾可能是有些冷酷，但我们的需求必然先于他们。

translations.english: You have done well.
translations.chinese: 你做得很好。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

translations.english: Don't. Get. Caught.
translations.chinese: 别。被。抓。

translations.english: I hope you comprehend killing better than you comprehend speech.
translations.chinese: 我希望你对杀戮的理解比对话语更好。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

translations.english: Good.
translations.chinese: 很好。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02015E0B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Good. | ZH: 很好。 | SID: 001BCA

translations.english: I've learned the whereabouts of a troublesome Dawnguard member. You will track him down and dispose of him.
translations.chinese: 我知道了一个麻烦的黎明守卫的下落。你要找到他，然后处理掉他。

translations.english: But please, do be discreet. Our aim isn't to stir the nest, just to skin a rat, reminding them that they are the prey.
translations.chinese: 但请谨慎行事。我们的目的不是为了捣了老窝，只是剥老鼠的皮，提醒他们自己是猎物。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

translations.english: Good. I prefer to nip budding problems before they reach full bloom. I trust it wasn't too much of an effort on your part.
translations.chinese: 很好。我喜欢在问题萌芽阶段就把它们扼杀，相信对你来说并不太费力。

agentText:

translations.english: Excellent. I knew I could count on you. That's one less trouble maker to keep an eye on.
translations.chinese: 太好了，我就知道你靠得住。又少了一个要关注的麻烦制造者。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

translations.english: While that's one less trouble maker to keep an eye on, you could have been more discreet in your approach to the problem.
translations.chinese: 虽然少了一个需要关注的麻烦制造者，但你本可以更谨慎的处理这个问题。

translations.english: I had thought better of you.
translations.chinese: 我本来以为你能做得更好。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

translations.english: It is time to cull the weak.
translations.chinese: 是时候淘汰弱者了。

translations.english: The herd is becoming distressed, which makes it more difficult for us to slip in and out undetected.
translations.chinese: 牧群们越来越忧虑，这让我们更难在不被发现的情况下进出。

translations.english: A cadre of lesser beasts has become a nuisance, taking too bold an approach to their feeding.
translations.chinese: 有个低级野血种的骨干变得令人生厌，对食物们的方式过于大胆。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02015E11]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: The herd is becoming distressed, which makes it more difficult for us to slip in and out undetected. | ZH: 牧群们越来越忧虑，这让我们更难在不被发现的情况下进出。 | SID: 001720
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: A cadre of lesser beasts has become a nuisance, taking too bold an approach to their feeding. | ZH: 有个低级野血种的骨干变得令人生厌，对食物们的方式过于大胆。 | SID: 0019EE

translations.english: We don't need competition for blood, and we don't want the mortals getting up in arms making things difficult for us.
translations.chinese: 我们不需要为了鲜血而争斗，也不希望凡人拿起武器给我们制造麻烦。

translations.english: Go destroy the feral beast before this becomes a problem.
translations.chinese: 在这出问题之前去消灭那个野种吧。

translations.english: You are to destroy the feral creature before this small problem becomes a larger one.
translations.chinese: 在这个问题加剧之前，你得消灭这个野种。

translations.english: Needless to say, we can't abide that, as it would raise general alarm amongst the herd, to say nothing of the increased feeding competition.
translations.chinese: 不用怀疑，我们不能容忍这种行为，这会引起牧群的普遍警觉，更不用说会导致更激烈的进食斗争了。

translations.chinese: 有个野血种加入了一群抢匪，大概想把礼物分给他们。

translations.english: Let's check that out.
translations.chinese: 我们来看看。

translations.english: The effect around you looks an awful lot like that huge column of light shining on the dais.
translations.chinese: 你周围的样子就像巨大光柱照在台上。

translations.english: What about Auriel's Bow? Do you know where we can find it?
translations.chinese: 奥瑞艾尔之弓呢？你知道哪里能找到吗？

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02015FA0]

translations.english: After everything we've been through, it had damn well better work.
translations.chinese: 经历了这么多，它最好是成功了。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02015FA1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: After everything we've been through, it had damn well better work. | ZH: 经历了这么多，它最好是成功了。 | SID: 001C7C

translations.english: I could see it in your eyes. You looked about a thousand leagues away.
translations.chinese: 我能从你眼睛里看出来，就像是去了千里之外。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02015FA2]

translations.english: I never trusted those damn scrolls. Who knows what those things could have done to you... just look at Dexion.
translations.chinese: 我从不相信这些该死的卷轴，谁知道会对你有什么伤害……看戴希翁就知道了。

translations.chinese: 你没事吧？我快以为你要没了……你变得跟雪一样白。

translations.english: Then let's get going. I want to get there before my father has a chance to track us down.
translations.chinese: 那赶快出发吧，得赶在我父亲追上我们之前赶到那里。

translations.chinese: 当然了，他们出发点是好的，但我跟伊士冉一直都不对付。

translations.english: You can't walk around here like some common mortal!

translations.english: Talk to Serana, and decide which you want to be.

translations.english: Without the royal blood flowing through you, you're one step away from the rest of the thralls.

translations.english: You disrespect Lord Harkon by walking around here like that. Go see him at once, else you might find yourself in a cage.
translations.chinese: 你在这儿到处乱走是对哈孔大人的不敬。现在就去见他，不然你会发现自己被关在笼子里。

translations.english: Quite bold, to return here as a mortal. Some will take offense.

translations.chinese: 不，你必须离开！要是被看到和你说话，他们就要责怪我了！

translations.english: You're mortal? What are you doing here like that?
translations.chinese: 你是个凡人？在这里干什么？

translations.english: Mortals aren't allowed to freely roam the castle. Not even you.
translations.chinese: 凡人是不允许在城堡里自由活动的，即使是你。

translations.chinese: 我们是为天际阻挡灾难之人。

translations.english: We'll stop them, whatever it is they're up to...
translations.chinese: 我们会阻止他们，粉碎他们的阴谋……

agentText:

EDID: [02017688]

translations.english: Arkay, we're going to need your help more than ever.
translations.chinese: 阿尔凯，我们现在比任何时候都更需要你帮助。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0201768A]

translations.english: My father's never been much for building things, so it just stayed like this.
translations.chinese: 我父亲从来都对建筑不怎么上心，所以就让它保持这个样子了。

translations.english: The poor thing living here probably just fell out of favor upstairs.
translations.chinese: 住在这里的可怜人应该是在楼上失宠了。

translations.english: Who knows? It was in shambles when we first got here.
translations.chinese: 谁知道呢？我们第一次来这里的时候，它就已经一片狼藉了。

Addon: Dawnguard

translations.english: Like I said, we were never very close. Not a lot of father-daughter bonding if you know what I mean.
translations.chinese: 就像我说的，我们俩从来都不是很亲。我俩之间没太多父女之情，你明白我的意思吧。

translations.english: But once we threw our lot in with Molag Bal... people just don't think about their families anymore. "Power takes precedence," he always said.
translations.chinese: 不过一旦把自己交给莫拉格·巴尔……人们就不太考虑他们的家庭了。“力量第一。”他总是这么说。

translations.english: I liked to explore. My parents almost never let me off the island, so yeah, I poked around down here a lot.
translations.chinese: 我喜欢探索。我父母几乎不让我离开岛，所以，我老是在这里闲逛。

translations.english: It was a little... quieter... back then. Guess a little vampire girl was enough to scare off the rats.
translations.chinese: 那时候……这里……更安静些。我猜一个吸血鬼小姑娘也足够把老鼠们吓跑了。

translations.chinese: 我以前从来没见过。

translations.english: My mother had a bit of a thing for magical constructs. Not... not what you're thinking. She just found them fascinating.
translations.chinese: 我母亲有个小爱好，喜欢有点魔力的东西。不……不是你想的那样。她就是觉得很吸引人。

translations.english: Take a left up here. This is one of those weird double-barred security measures that my father put in when he got more paranoid.
translations.chinese: 在这里左转。这是我父亲在他变得更偏执的时候，建造的奇怪双保险设施之一。

translations.english: If we follow that path around, we can find the other switch.
translations.chinese: 如果我们沿着这条路走，就能找到另一个开关了。

translations.chinese: 不管怎样，我们得继续前进了。

Addon: Dawnguard

translations.chinese: 我以前从来没有见过城堡的这一部分。当心点。我不知道周围会有什么东西。

agentText:

translations.english: The old water cistern. On some days, this would smell just... be glad you weren't here then.
translations.chinese: 旧蓄水池，在某些日子，这闻起来简直……庆幸那会儿你不在吧。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020176AA]
Translations:

translations.english: I just wonder if that meant it was my job to be giving.
translations.chinese: 我就想知道我的意义就是用来牺牲。

translations.english: Oh, they definitely were.
translations.chinese: 哦，他们确实如此。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020176AB]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Oh, they definitely were. | ZH: 哦，他们确实如此。 | SID: 00195C

translations.english: Definitely. You must think my life has been so strange. It sounds like your family wasn't nearly as fractured as mine.
translations.chinese: 当然了。你一定觉得我的生活非常奇怪。听起来似乎你家不像我家一样这么不圆满。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020176AC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Definitely. You must think my life has been so strange. It sounds like your family wasn't nearly as fractured as mine. | ZH: 当然了。你一定觉得我的生活非常奇怪。听起来似乎你家不像我家一样这么不圆满。 | SID: 0019BA

translations.english: I had always just assumed that the other tower was completely destroyed inside.
translations.chinese: 我一直以为另一座塔楼的内部已经彻底被摧毁了。

translations.english: My mother kept this a secret, even from me. She must have been up to something she thought was dangerous.
translations.chinese: 我母亲一直保密，连我也瞒着。她一定是觉得这件事很危险。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

translations.english: Everything eventually tumbles down to you.

translations.english: You don't know what it's like, coming from a family like that.
translations.chinese: 出生自这种家庭，你不知道这是种什么感觉。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

translations.english: Sorry, I know you're trying to help. Thanks.
translations.chinese: 抱歉，我知道你试着在帮我。谢谢。

translations.english: I know that in my head. But I just can't help feeling bad about... the way things are.
translations.chinese: 我心里很清楚，但我就是忍不住难过……事实如此。

translations.english: It was.

translations.english: That's easy to say, but I definitely didn't help things.
translations.chinese: 说来容易，但我确实没帮上忙。

agentText:

EDID: [020176B2]

translations.english: But I think I turned out ok.

translations.english: I was.
translations.chinese: 我是啊。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

translations.english: He has neglected using it for ages. If he wants it filled now, then grander things are afoot. This is good.
translations.chinese: 他多年来一直忽视了对它的使用，如果现在想把它填满，那么就有更宏伟的计划要开始了。很好。

translations.english: Our power is a blessing from him. It is he who first bestowed the gift of the ancient blood upon me.
translations.chinese: 我们的力量是他给予的祝福。是他第一次将古老的血脉赐予我。

translations.english: A shrine to Molag Bal, the mighty Daedra Prince who is father to all our kind.
translations.chinese: 莫拉格·巴尔的祭坛，强大的迪德拉君王，也是我们族类的父亲。

translations.english: I assure you, no harm was done. In truth, your strength surprises me. Not all mortals can withstand my embrace.
translations.chinese: 放心吧，百利无害。说实话，你的力量让我吃惊，不是所有凡人都经得起我的拥抱。

translations.english: My blood is potent. At first, the body is overwhelmed by it.
translations.chinese: 我的血液太过强大。一开始，你的身体会被它浸没。

translations.english: Now, listen to my words and do as I instruct.
translations.chinese: 现在，听我的话，照我的吩咐去做。

translations.english: In an age long forgotten to history, I ruled as a mighty king. My domain was vast, my riches endless and my power infinite.

translations.english: I pledged myself to Molag Bal, and in his name I sacrificed a thousand innocents.
translations.chinese: 我向莫拉格·巴尔发誓，以他的名义牺牲了一千名无辜之人。

translations.english: And yet, as my mortal life neared an end, I faced a seemingly invincible enemy -- my own mortality.
translations.chinese: 然而，在我的凡人生命接近尾声时，我面临着一个看似不可战胜的敌人——自身的死亡。

translations.english: In reward, he gave everlasting life to myself, my wife and my daughter. And so I have defeated mortality itself.
translations.chinese: 作为回报，他赐予了我和妻儿永生，所以我战胜了死亡本身。

translations.chinese: 莫拉格·巴尔是个强大的迪德拉君王，他的意志能改变现实。

translations.english: For those willing to subjugate themselves, he will still bestow the gift, but they must be powerful in their own right before earning his trust.
translations.chinese: 对于那些愿意臣服的人，他仍然会赐予礼物，但他们必须凭借自身力量才能获得他的信任。

translations.chinese: 治愈？为什么会这么想？

translations.english: It may have driven my family apart, but I'm still here, and I'm alive. I won't give this up.
translations.chinese: 这东西确实可能会撕裂我的家庭，但我还在这里，还活着。我不会放弃。

Addon: Dawnguard

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: It may have driven my family apart, but I'm still here, and I'm alive. I won't give this up. | ZH: 这东西确实可能会撕裂我的家庭，但我还在这里，还活着。我不会放弃。 | SID: 00288F

translations.english: I have to admit, I'm impressed. I didn't think you had the spirit for it.
translations.chinese: 不得不承认，我很佩服你。我本来是觉得你没有这种想法的。

translations.english: I'm not sure it's really your place to judge me.
translations.chinese: 我觉得你没资格来评判我。

translations.english: My family has its problems, but they're our problems.
translations.chinese: 我家里是有问题，但那是我们的问题。

translations.chinese: 这不同于从其他吸血鬼那里得到的弱化子嗣的力量，我们是纯血创造的原始吸血鬼。

translations.english: And it all ended with me being locked underground for who knows how long.
translations.chinese: 最后我被关在地下不知道有多久。

translations.english: It's definitely been a bad thing, on the whole.
translations.chinese: 总的来说，肯定是坏事。

translations.english: We need to strike a crippling blow against them before they muster more men against us.
translations.chinese: 我们得在他们召集更多人对付我们之前，给他们致命一击。

translations.chinese: 如果你想浪费你的时间，没有关系。不过我心里有我自己要去的地方。也许当你完事的时候，你能帮我到那里去？

translations.english: Yes, he definitely sounds like he knows what to do.
translations.chinese: 没错，他听上去肯定知道该怎么办。

translations.english: But what of Serana? Can she be trusted to lift a blade against her own kind? Her own family?

translations.chinese: 啊，我知道你跟瓦蕾莉卡谈过了，她让你相信永夜会让我们跟白昼的子民们开战。

translations.chinese: 若真是如此就好了，世界笼罩于阴影，我们永无倦意……可比他们可怜的军队强多了。

translations.english: I suppose that's as much as I can hope for.
translations.chinese: 我猜也只能这么希望了。

translations.chinese: 现在我们有了奥瑞艾尔之弓，诸神都眷顾我们，必须以行动回应！

translations.english: Sadly, yes. It's the inevitable fate we agree to pursue when reading the Elder Scrolls.
translations.chinese: 很遗憾，确实如此。这是不可避免的命运。我们在阅读上古卷轴时就已经接受了。

translations.chinese: 无论你信不信，卷轴自身是有想法的。如果它们不想被你找到，你就根本找不到。

translations.english: You've come this far, and you've found several Elder Scrolls.

translations.english: Only the most resilient of priests can do it this way... it takes years of practice to interpret the harmony.
translations.chinese: 只有最有韧性的祭司才能这么做……领悟和谐需要多年的实践。

translations.chinese: 正是通过这种合奏，先祖蛾的拍音成了一种原始预言的形式，并成为破译卷轴的渠道。

translations.english: It can take months or even years to complete a single scroll and even then, months to recover.
translations.chinese: 阅读一幅卷轴可能需要几个月甚至几年时间来完成，即使这样，还要几个月来恢复。

translations.english: Deciphering one of the Elder Scrolls is nothing like reading a simple book. There's quite a bit of ritual and concentration required.
translations.chinese: 解读上古卷轴不像阅读一本寻常书籍，需要相当多的仪式和专注力。

translations.english: Whether or not you've become one of us in order to survive the Soul Cairn, you're still a vampire hunter at heart.
translations.chinese: 无论当初你是不是为了在灵魂石冢存活下来而成为我们中的一员，但内心深处还是个吸血鬼猎人。

translations.english: You're here because we're abominations in your mind. Evil creatures that need to be destroyed.
translations.chinese: 你来到这里是因为你对我们深恶痛绝。觉得我们只是应该被消灭的邪恶生物。

translations.english: You care nothing for Serana or our plight.
translations.chinese: 你根本不在乎瑟拉娜跟我们的处境。

translations.english: Yes. Please, follow me.
translations.chinese: 没错。请跟我来。

translations.english: The Ideal Masters have charged him with overseeing the Keepers, and will undoubtedly investigate the fact that the barrier has fallen.
translations.chinese: 理想之主派他监督看守者，他肯定会已经察觉到结界消失了。

translations.english: One more word of warning. There's a dragon that calls itself Durnehviir roaming the Cairn.
translations.chinese: 提醒一句，石冢里游荡着一条叫杜耐维尔的龙。

translations.chinese: 万幸，你已经杀死维持遗迹周围结界的看守者了。

translations.english: Yes. I've kept it safely secured here ever since I was imprisoned.
translations.chinese: 没错。自从我被关在这里，我就一直把它妥善保管好了。

translations.english: Drinking it gives you strength, but it also gets you pretty messed up... That's why we thought of putting it in the skooma.
translations.chinese: 喝了它会给你力量，但也会让你心乱如麻……这就是我们为什么想把它掺在斯库玛里。

translations.english: If a line of communication could be established with them, maybe they can find peace.
translations.chinese: 如果能与他们建立沟通渠道，也许能找到和平相处的办法。

translations.english: Perhaps they'll never return to their former appearance, but over the centuries, I've noticed a rise in their intellect.
translations.chinese: 也许他们再也回不到原来的样子了，但几个世纪以来，我注意到他们的智力在提高。

translations.english: It's the only way they'll discover that they weren't always malignant... they were once a proud and prosperous race.
translations.chinese: 只有这样，他们才会发现自身并非总是充满恶意……他们曾经是一个自豪而繁荣的种族。

translations.english: The twisted forms you've seen didn't occur overnight. It isn't a plague or a disease that ravaged our species.
translations.chinese: 你所见的扭曲形态并非一夜之间形成的，它不是一种肆虐我族的瘟疫或疾病。

translations.english: The dwarves may have stolen their sight, but it took many generations for them to become what they are today.
translations.chinese: 矮人们可能确实偷走了他们的视力，但他们也繁衍了很多代才变成如今的模样。

translations.english: I feel nothing but sympathy for the Betrayed, despite my actions against them.
translations.chinese: 无论他们做了什么，我对他们都只有同情。

translations.english: But I'm afraid that they're well beyond a cure at this point.
translations.chinese: 但恐怕目前还治不了。
